name: Frenuloplasty
description: Surgical correction of a tight or short frenulum to improve comfort and function.
preOperativeInstructions: Fast for 6 hours only if having general anaesthetic. Most procedures are under local anaesthetic.
postOperativeInstructions: Keep the area clean. Avoid sexual activity for at least 4 weeks. Dissolving stitches will fall out naturally over 2-3 weeks.
expectedOutcomes: Improved comfort during erection and sexual activity. Initial healing in about 10-14 days with continued healing over the following weeks.

uiCustomization.welcomeBody: This quick procedure typically has excellent outcomes with minimal downtime.

checklistOverrides.text: If advised, rinse with warm saline
Avoid sexual stimulation for the first week

commonConcerns.response: No, we use dissolvable stitches that fall out naturally within 2 weeks.

commonConcerns.concern: When can I resume sexual activity?
commonConcerns.response: Wait at least 4 weeks to allow complete healing.
